title: How to Set Up and Use SpaceBot (Better Than OpenClaw?)
summary: SpaceBot is an open-source framework built for deploying AI agents across community platforms including Discord, Telegram, Slack, Twitch, and WebChat. The tutorial demonstrates Docker setup, model routing for token efficiency, integration with multiple scraping services via Apify, and use of both closed-source models like Claude Sonnet and open-source alternatives for debugging and cost optimization.
